diagram_title: Context Sharing V2 — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Runtime
systems.description: Main runtime that owns sessions, task delegation, and compaction.

containers.name: Session Runtime
containers.description: Prompt loop, task dispatch, continuation, and shared context surfaces.

components.name: Child Prompt Loop
components.description: Loads parent message prefix once per prompt loop and prepends it to child model calls.

components.name: Task Dispatch
components.description: Creates child task prompts without SharedContext snapshot injection.

components.name: Task Worker Continuation
components.description: Builds parent continuation evidence from child completion outputs.

components.name: Shared Context Store
components.description: Retains per-session compaction and observability summaries after V2 bridge changes.

relationships.description: Dispatch creates child work that runs through the prompt loop.
Prompt loop updates shared context for compaction and observability.
Continuation merges child evidence into parent shared context.
Continuation relies on child transcript output produced by prompt execution.
